consistency.notes: The spell description logically details the creation, utility (light), and offensive use (ranged attack) of the flame, adhering to standard D&D 5e mechanics.

quality.notes: The text is clear, well-structured, and provides all necessary mechanical details (damage dice, scaling, range, components, duration).

mechanics.action_economy: Can be sustained as an object, or used as an action to attack (which ends the spell).
mechanics.potential_issues: None identified. The spell clearly states that using the attack action ends the spell, which is a key mechanical choice for the user.
